name: refactoring
display_name: Refactoring: Improving the Design of Existing Code
description: 10 skills for systematic code refactoring — smell diagnosis, method decomposition, conditional simplification, class responsibility realignment, data organization, type code handling, test suite construction, and large-scale refactoring planning, extracted from Refactoring by Martin Fowler

source_book.title: Refactoring: Improving the Design of Existing Code

skills.name: code-smell-diagnosis
skills.description: Scan a codebase or code fragment for the 22 named code smells from Fowler's refactoring catalog and produce a prioritized diagnosis report with the specific refactoring prescription for each smell.

skills.name: refactoring-readiness-assessment
skills.description: Assess whether a codebase situation warrants refactoring and determine the right approach — refactor first, refactor not at all, or rewrite entirely — before any structural changes begin.

skills.name: build-refactoring-test-suite
skills.description: Build a sufficient automated test suite before refactoring existing code using a 6-step sequential construction workflow and a bug-fix variant.

skills.name: profiling-driven-performance-optimization
skills.description: Optimize code performance by first refactoring to a well-factored structure, then running a profiler to find actual hot spots, and applying targeted optimizations only where the profiler points.

skills.name: method-decomposition-refactoring
skills.description: Decompose long, tangled methods into clean, composable units using the 9 composing-method refactorings from Fowler's catalog — Extract Method, Replace Temp with Query, Split Temporary Variable, and more.

skills.name: type-code-refactoring-selector
skills.description: Select and execute the correct refactoring path for type codes — Replace Type Code with Class, Subclasses, or State/Strategy — using Fowler's three-way decision tree.

skills.name: conditional-simplification-strategy
skills.description: Select and apply the correct refactoring for complex or tangled conditional logic — covering all 8 conditional refactorings from Fowler Chapter 9 plus Introduce Assertion.

skills.name: class-responsibility-realignment
skills.description: Redistribute methods and fields to the classes that own them, repair broken inheritance hierarchies, and extend unmodifiable library classes — covering Feature Envy, Shotgun Surgery, Middle Man, and more.

skills.name: data-organization-refactoring
skills.description: Apply the correct data organization refactoring when code smells in data structure design are diagnosed — Primitive Obsession, Data Clumps, Data Class, magic numbers, and raw collections.

skills.name: big-refactoring-planner
skills.description: Plan and execute architectural-scale refactoring campaigns — Tease Apart Inheritance, Convert Procedural Design to Objects, Separate Domain from Presentation, Extract Hierarchy — with multi-week campaign plans.

minimal.description: 3 foundation skills — smell diagnosis, readiness assessment, and test suite construction

core.description: 6 skills — hub skill plus all Level 1 decision skills for the most common refactoring scenarios

full.description: All 10 skills — complete refactoring system covering diagnosis, planning, testing, decomposition, and architectural restructuring
